basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Environmental Engineering Research Center (CSIR NEERI)
basic_details.short_information: National Environmental Engineering Research Center (CSIR NEERI) Project Assistant-II Notification 2026 has been released on 13 July 2026 on the official website neeri.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. in Computer Science/IT from a recognized University
qualification.details: B.Sc. in Computer Science/IT from a recognized University.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NEERI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR NEERI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Last Date of Submission of Online Application

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NEERI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Project Assistant-II position is 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant-II post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree in Computer Science or IT from a recognized university to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant-II role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant-II position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant-II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant-II position announced by CSIR NEERI.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Online Interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant-II position is a contractual role at CSIR NEERI.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CSIR NEERI located?
faq.answer: CSIR NEERI is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra, with the pincode 440020.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Nagpur, Maharashtra. While not explicitly stated, it's generally advisable for candidates to check if there are any state-specific requirements or preferences mentioned in the full notification.
